TIP Console:                        toc
TIP Self Healing:                   false
TIP Self Healing Timeout Seconds:   3600
TIP CRN:                            crn:v1:bluemix:public:storage-platform-acadia:us-east:::microservice: 

Event Generated:

Severity:            sev-2
Metric:

  (ceph_health_detail{name="MON_DOWN", agent_tag_cluster = "mzonep72" } == 1) * on() (
    count(ceph_mon_quorum_status{agent_tag_cluster = "mzonep72" }== 1) == bool (floor(count(ceph_mon_metadata {agent_tag_cluster = "mzonep72" }) / 2) + 1)
  )
) == 1 = 1.00

State:               Triggered
